_comment: CodeLens MCP Server Configuration Templates — Copy the relevant section to your AI tool's config file

claude_desktop._instructions: Add the mcpServers section to your claude_desktop_config.json file

cursor._instructions: Add the mcpServers section to your .cursor/mcp.json file

vscode._instructions: Add the mcp section to your VS Code settings.json. Requires the MCP extension or GitHub Copilot with MCP support.

continue_dev._instructions: Add the mcpServers section to your Continue.dev config.json file

cline._instructions: Add the mcpServers section for Cline (VS Code extension)

aider._instructions: Configure MCP tools for Aider. Run: codelens serve --port 8080 first, then configure Aider to use the HTTP endpoint.
aider.note: Aider doesn't natively support MCP yet. Use the HTTP/SSE endpoint with custom scripting.
